metric_caveats: This is the full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
These are partial ExECT S4 diagnostics (eleven families), not CUI-aware all-family benchmark reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across eleven families is not comparable to frozen S3 nine-family or S2 five-family headlines.
S3 label-policy bridges from frozen v1.2 are reused; see docs/experiments/exect/exect_s4_gold_policy.md.
This config intentionally avoids ChainOfThought, BootstrapFewShot, and GEPA per docs/policies/qwen_dspy_latency_policy.md.
Do not compare this run to GPT full validation as the same experiment.
Report per-family F1 and monitor frozen S3 families for regression vs S3 v1.2 GPT anchor (…235439Z).
Record local Ollama GPU residency or RAM offload when inspecting artifacts.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
